summary: Platform Scaling Enterprise Modules - All 4 modules fully tested: Real-Time Event Architecture, Multi-Property Platform, Revenue ML, Competitive Set Analysis. All 28 backend pytest tests pass. All 5 frontend tabs load correctly with proper data-testid attributes, real data display, and interactive features working.

issues: Property name shows as tenant_id (044f122b-87b5-...) instead of hotel_name - main agent notes this is due to missing hotel_name in tenant record
Console warnings about chart dimensions -1x-1 on initial render, likely due to container not fully sized before chart renders - cosmetic issue

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 platform scaling modules properly implemented with correct service classes
Event Architecture: EnhancedEventBus with WebSocketGateway (in-memory), auto-priority routing, MongoDB persistence
Multi-Property: CentralReservationService, CentralRevenueManagement, GlobalAlertSystem with cross-property aggregation
Revenue ML: DemandForecastingModel, RateElasticityModel, BookingProbabilityModel, CancellationPredictionModel using statistical models
Competitive Analysis: CompetitorPriceTracker, MarketPositioning, ADRAdjustmentEngine with market position calculations
All 27 API endpoints under /api/platform/* properly authenticated via get_current_user
Frontend dashboard has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Turkish language used correctly for all UI labels

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 tabs load with data, interactive features work)

seed_data_creation: Event publishing and competitor addition tested - events appear in stream, competitors appear in comp set
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Scaling dashboard at /platform-scaling with 5 tabs: Genel Bakis (Overview), Event Mimari (Event Architecture), Multi-Property, Revenue ML, CompSet Analiz. All APIs at /api/platform/*. WebSocket gateway is in-memory mock but all events persist to MongoDB. Rate parity shows 'Bilinmiyor' (Unknown) when no competitor rate data exists for that room type.

backend_pytest_28_tests: test_publish_event - POST /api/platform/events/publish creates event with auto-priority
test_publish_invalid_event_type - Returns 400 for unknown event type
test_event_analytics - GET /api/platform/events/analytics returns by_type, by_priority, gateway_stats
test_portfolio_overview - GET /api/platform/multi-property/portfolio returns properties with occupancy
test_portfolio_revenue - GET /api/platform/multi-property/revenue returns revenue by property
test_ml_dashboard - GET /api/platform/ml/dashboard returns comprehensive ML data
test_rate_parity - GET /api/platform/competitive/rate-parity returns room type parity
test_competitive_dashboard - GET /api/platform/competitive/dashboard returns combined comp data
frontend_playwright_tests: 5 Module tabs present: Genel Bakis, Event Mimari, Multi-Property, Revenue ML, CompSet Analiz
Overview tab: 6 KPI cards showing real data (30 rooms, 54 risky reservations, 1 global alert, 5 events)
Overview tab: Properties Overview card, Global Alerts card, ML Summary card, Event Priority pie chart
Event Architecture tab: Publish Event form, Event Analytics (24h), Live Event Stream, Escalation Queue, WebSocket Gateway Stats
Event publishing interactive test: Successfully published competitor_price_change event
Multi-Property tab: 4 KPI cards (Portfolio Doluluk, Toplam Oda, Musait Oda, Portfolio Gelir)
Multi-Property tab: Property Comparison table, Revenue Distribution chart, Alerts list
Revenue ML tab: Demand Forecast chart, Price Optimization table, Conversion Rates chart, At-Risk Bookings table
Competitive tab: Add Competitor form, Comp Set list, Rate Parity table, ADR Suggestions
Competitor addition interactive test: Successfully added 'Test Hotel Istanbul' 5-star competitor

mocked_api_note: WebSocket gateway is in-memory (no real WebSocket connections), but all events are persisted in MongoDB and accessible via REST APIs
